latin: Light librum mortis aperuit et tubulum solani cepit. 'hunc tubulum solani capiam,' inquit lente, 'et edam!' tum momordit quasi totum mundum vinceret.

questions.prompt: What does Light do with it?

translation: Light opened the death book and took a potato chip. 'I will take this potato chip,' he said slowly, 'and eat it!' Then he bit into it as if he were conquering the whole world.
